posting.sourceTitle: Sheet Metal JATC of Rochester LU #46
posting.sponsorName: Joint Apprenticeship and Training Committee (JATC) for Sheet Metal Workers of Rochester, Local Union #46
posting.unionName: Sheet Metal Workers of Rochester, Local Union #46
posting.locationSummary: Rochester, NY area; Local Union #46 jurisdiction
posting.applicationSummary: Apply online at SMW46.com during the recruitment period. Applications must be received by 11:59 p.m. on April 7, 2027.
posting.applicationHours: Available online during the recruitment period.
posting.ageRequirement: Must be at least 18 years old.
posting.educationRequirement: Must have a high school diploma or high school equivalency diploma (such as TASC or GED), with one year of algebra with a passing grade in Math Course I or Math Course II; or a minimum score of 55 on the TASC or GED math test.
posting.residencyRequirement: Must be a resident for at least one year within the jurisdiction of Sheet Metal Workers of Rochester, Local Union #46, including Livingston, Monroe, Ontario, Seneca, Wayne, and Yates counties.
posting.transportationRequirement: Must have a valid NYS driver’s license to operate company vehicles and reliable transportation to and from job sites and required classes at the approved school.
posting.drugTestRequirement: Must take and pass a drug test upon offer of employment. May be subject to additional drug testing at any time during the apprenticeship program. Drug testing is paid for by the sponsor.
posting.classRequirement: Must have reliable transportation to required classes at the approved school.
allRequirements: Must be at least 18 years old.

Must have a high school diploma or a high school equivalency diploma (such as TASC or GED), with one year of algebra with a passing grade in Math Course I or Math Course II; or a minimum of 55 on the TASC or GED math test.
Must sign an affidavit attesting they are physically able to perform the work of the trade.

Work in the sheet metal industry may be physical and strenuous, including climbing ladders, scaffolds and roofs; working at great heights; lifting materials in excess of 70 lbs.; and working outdoors in all types of weather conditions.
Must take and pass a drug test upon offer of employment.
May be subject to additional drug testing at any time during the apprenticeship program.
Drug testing is paid for by the sponsor.
Must have a valid NYS driver’s license in order to operate company vehicles.
Must have reliable transportation to and from various job sites and required classes at the approved school.

Must be a resident, for at least one year, within the jurisdiction of Sheet Metal Workers of Rochester, Local Union #46, including the counties of Livingston, Monroe, Ontario, Seneca, Wayne, and Yates.
posting.requirementsSummary: Applicants must be at least 18, have the required high school diploma or equivalency and algebra/math qualification, be physically able to do strenuous trade work, pass drug testing, have a valid NYS driver’s license, have reliable transportation, and meet the one-year residency requirement.
posting.contactName: Sheet Metal Workers of Rochester, Local Union #46
posting.contactSummary: Contact Sheet Metal Workers of Rochester, Local Union #46 at (585) 254-9151 for further information or technical questions.
